name: terraform-dev
postCreateCommand: curl https://mise.run | sh && MISE_CONFIG_FILE=.devcontainer/mise.toml ~/.local/bin/mise install && MISE_CONFIG_FILE=.devcontainer/mise.toml ~/.local/bin/mise exec -- npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code @openai/codex && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y git-delta zsh-autosuggestions zsh-syntax-highlighting
